page_content:
RUSS329 Soviet Literature in Translation (3 Credits)

Russian literature between 1917 and the fall of the Soviet Union, both as a continuation of pre-revolutionary traditions and as a reflection of Soviet ideology.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

RUSS334 Soviet Film: Propaganda, Myth, Modernism (3 Credits)

A Survey of Soviet film from the 1920s to 1991, focusing on important directors, genres, themes, and styles. Taught in English.

Cross-listed with: CINE334.

Credit Only Granted for. RUSS334, CINE334, or FILM334.
